data.body: SESSION HANDOFF (identity escalation session, 2026-07-14). Epic 6d0d-7580-e18f-48c3 (sonic-columned-sturgeon) op-cert escalation RESOLVED. Design settled in the epic description's three resolution sections: (1) Producer-signing & compute-runtime resolution — fork A uniform producer signing via the signing.sign_manifest seam, local Ed25519 key genesis at <tracker>/.opcert-key, no verify.opcert_env_id repo key (deployment-config identity), per-kind native verdicts, cost-verified runtime = compose service on the existing rebar-gerrit t4g.large behind API Gateway HTTP API AWS_IAM (zero fixed-cost; Fargate/Lambda/Secrets-Manager/KMS-CMK rejected); (2) Verify-side authoritative-input rule (finding #4); (3) Authoritative era anchor (finding #5, era-at-storage-anchor, added_at_log_position/revoked_at_log_position, revoke-without-pin kill-switch). Tickets: ALL SIX hold signed plan-review PASS attestations, certified on read — 8d8e-30bc-6a7f-4cb1 producer seam (new), ee0b-c5e2-3454-42f1 trusted gate service (rewritten), 76d2-00c3-88e8-4654 IaC+deploy (new), 8f1d-72d5-d8b1-400f HMAC contract (rewritten), 6a89-1165-ea58-4be3 docs/ADR (updated), 4214-ac28-d19c-41b9 merge-gate remediation. Deps: ee0b->8d8e, 76d2->ee0b, 8f1d->8d8e. Implementation order: land 649/650/660 -> 664 new patchset (4214) -> 8d8e -> ee0b -> 76d2 -> 8f1d -> 6a89. ~12 review rounds, ~60 blocking findings, all legitimate; no gate-criteria escalation needed. AWS account audited (896586841071 us-east-1); API credit balance ran low mid-session (one INDETERMINATE), recovered.
